pillarsSection.heading: One foundation, three pillars of work.
pillarsSection.lead: An umbrella structure that maintains the building blocks developers rely on today, opens the fastest path to building a next-gen digital health solution, and creates a neutral space for what comes next.

diagram.connectorTop: held up by the three pillars

pillars.name: FHIR Foundations
pillars.cardBody: The foundational kotlin and java libraries for working with FHIR. Includes new multi-platform kotlin FHIR SDK and battle-tested components for Android, access control and analytics, sustained by an active community of technical partners.
cardBullets: Client and server side SDKs and libraries for building on FHIR

pillars.name: Reference Toolkit
pillars.cardBody: The fastest way to develop and deploy a next-gen digital health solution — a complete, composable reference implementation built on the FHIR Foundations libraries, ready for Android, iOS and web.
cardBullets: KMP client app, web portal & backend

pillars.name: AI Commons
pillars.cardBody: A neutral space for collaboration on safe, effective and Verifiable AI for Global Health — focused on model-agnostic capabilities like evals, benchmarks, tooling for Verifiable AI, developed with the WHO and partners.
cardBullets: Tooling to support Evals & benchmarks for Health AI
pillars.ecoSub: Safe, verifiable AI for global health
pillars.diagramDesc: Safe, verifiable AI · with the WHO

ecosystemNodes.name: kotlin-fhir
ecosystemNodes.desc: Lean, fast KMP implementation of the HL7® FHIR® data model.

ecosystemNodes.name: kotlin-fhirpath
ecosystemNodes.desc: KMP implementation of FHIRPath for querying FHIR resources.

ecosystemNodes.name: Client FHIR SDK
ecosystemNodes.desc: FHIR-native libraries for secure, offline-capable Multiplatform apps.

ecosystemNodes.name: FHIR Info Gateway
ecosystemNodes.desc: Privacy-preserving access control for patient data.

ecosystemNodes.name: FHIR Analytics
ecosystemNodes.desc: Transform FHIR data into trusted, faster insights.

ecosystemNodes.name: OHS Player
ecosystemNodes.desc: The reference runtime — deploy a next-gen digital health solution.

ecosystemNodes.name: Reference Client App
ecosystemNodes.desc: KMP-based configurable reference app built on OHS components.

ecosystemNodes.name: Reference Web Portal
ecosystemNodes.desc: Web-based management tool for healthcare workforce hierarchies.

ecosystemNodes.name: Reference Backend
ecosystemNodes.desc: Custom endpoints and access checker plugins for OHS Player clients.

ecosystemNodes.name: Evals & Benchmarks
ecosystemNodes.desc: Open tooling to measure health-AI safety and quality.

ecosystemNodes.name: Health MCPs
ecosystemNodes.desc: Model-agnostic context tooling for health workflows.

ecosystemNodes.name: Verifiable AI · WHO
ecosystemNodes.desc: Verifiable AI efforts in partnership with the WHO.
